channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Camelot Unchained Opens Weekend Session With New Archetype and Updated Spring Roadmap
item.content:encoded:
Just over a month ago, on March 27th, Unchained Entertainment officially launched Camelot Unchained into Early Access and revealed a spring roadmap. They’ve just released an updated spring roadmap and details on how feedback has shaped their plans.

The game has six archetypes and 18 classes at this time across three realms. The Devout archetype was on the roadmap for April and squeaked in on the last day of April just in time for the newest weekend play session, which is now open. The Devout is a melee fighter and healer combo intended as a durable frontline choice. As listed on their original roadmap, the team is also planning to add another new archetype in June, the Scout. 

The latest patch adds two new crafting tradeskills, Alchemy and Cooking, and added consumables. They also added new chat channels, overhauled lighting as well as tuned their animations to reduce jittering,  on top of adding audio to a few different areas and effects.

In addition to continuous work fixing bugs,  the team is focusing on a series of improvements to both performance and the player experience. As for what’s shifted on the roadmap, in part due to feedback from backers, water interactions and visual improvements and the mail system have been pushed into this month. Tradeskill specialization is now scheduled for June. 

Mason, the producer behind the devblog announcing the changes, wants us all to keep in mind that this is an ongoing and evolving process. Part of that is also taking into account feedback.  Early progression seems to be a little too slow and  the team is getting requests for tools to let people get geared up as fast as possible so they can get to the fight on War Wednesdays.  they've also been asked for greater flexibility on realm restrictions, as well as to address things like hotkey issues and line of sight errors.  working on resolving a number of those issues is why they are pushing back a few things on the roadmap.

You can check the new roadmap (and compare it to the previous one here), to see where things are going.  through June. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/camelot-unchained-opens-weekend-session-with-new-archetype-and-updated-spring-roadmap-2000137957
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
